overview.description: The Indexperts Yield Focused Fixed Income ETF (YFFI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund seeking current income by broadly investing in investment grade fixed income securities of any maturity. The fund selects securities perceived to offer attractive cash flow and yield. YFFI was launched on Jan 2, 2025 and is issued by Indexperts.
